Name of the Test: At least one source of information used to assess the clinical syndrome must be checked
Full Test Description: If Q8. PREDOMSYN (Is there a predominant clinical syndrome?) then at least one of the following variables must be equal to 1: Q9a. SYNINFCLIN, Q9b. SYNINFCTST, Q9c. SYNINFBIOM

Name of the Test: If all MCI criteria met then MCI must be present
Full Test Description: If (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline)=1 (Criteria met)) then Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?) must equal 1 (Yes)

Name of the Test: If less than 3 MCI criteria met then MCI must be absent
Full Test Description: If (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition) ne 1 (Criteria not met) or Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains) ne 1 (Criteria not met) or Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline) ne 1 (Criteria not met)) then Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?) must equal 0 (No)

Name of the Test: If any IMPNOCI criteria met then IMPNOMCI must be present
Full Test Description: If Q5a1. IMPNOMCIFU (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Evidence of functional impairment, but normal cognitive testing)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a2. IMPNOMCICG (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Abnormal cognitive testing but no clinical concern)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a3. IMPNOMCLCD (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Longstanding cognitive difficulties)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a4. IMPNOMCIO (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Other)=1 (Criteria met)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) should equal 1 (Yes)

Name of the Test: If only some MCI criteria met then IMPNOMCI should be present
Full Test Description: If only some MCI criteria met ((Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP ne 1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN ne 1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN ne 1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN=1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP ne 1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN=1)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) should equal 1 (Yes)

Name of the Test: If only the third MCI criteria is met then IMPNOMCI must be absent
Full Test Description: If (Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition) ne 1 (Criteria not met) and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains) ne 1 (Criteria not met)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) must equal 0 (No)

Name of the Test: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with determination on C2/C2T
Full Test Description: If Form C2/C2T COGSTAT (overall appraisal) in (1,2) (Better than normal for age or normal for age), then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should equal 1 (Yes)

Name of the Test: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with MoCA scores on C2
Full Test Description: If Form C2 Q1f. MOCATOTS (uncorrected MoCA total score) <4 then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

Name of the Test: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with MoCA scores on C2T
Full Test Description: If Form C2T Q1d. MOCBTOTS (uncorrected MoCA blind total score) <4 then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

Name of the Test: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLCOG & DECCLBE on B9
Full Test Description: If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) then Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) and Form B9 Q11. DECCLBE (Participant experiencing behavioral symptoms per clinician) should equal 0 (No) or blank

Name of the Test: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLCOG & DECCLBE on B9
Full Test Description: If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=0 (No) then either Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) or Form B9 Q11. DECCLBE (Participant experiencing behavioral symptoms per clinician) should equal 1 (Yes)

Name of the Test: Both dementia and MBI cannot be present
Full Test Description: If Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes) then Q7. MBI (MBI?) cannot equal 1 (Yes)

Name of the Test: Dementia diagnosis aligns with the previous visit
Full Test Description: If Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes) at the previous UDS visit, then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)
